seo.metaTitle: White-Label Ecommerce & Online Store for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Offer a turnkey online store under your brand. Hostopia's white-label ecommerce platform helps SMBs sell online with 40+ payment gateways, social selling, and zero transaction fees.

hero.headline: Help Your SMB Customers Start Selling Online — Under Your Brand
hero.subheadline: SMBs face growing pressure to sell online, but most lack the skills, budget, or time to manage a full ecommerce stack.
hero.description: Hostopia's white-label Online Store gives you a turnkey, mobile-ready ecommerce platform to resell under your brand. Integrated with Online Presence Builder, SMBs add a store to their existing website with one click — then scale as they grow.

items.title: Launch a store fast
items.body: A guided 5-step setup wizard handles products, taxes, shipping, and payment configuration.

image.alt: Quick online store setup and checkout

items.title: Sell everywhere
items.body: Website, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, Amazon, and Google Shopping — all from one dashboard.

items.title: Accept any payment
items.body: 40+ gateways including PayPal and Square, with multi-currency and real-time shipping support.

items.title: Keep full margins
items.body: Zero transaction fees. SMBs retain every dollar of margin on every sale.

image.alt: Revenue growth and healthy business margins

heroImage.alt: Ecommerce online store and retail selling

features.heading: Full-Featured Ecommerce — Without the Complexity
features.intro: Online Store provides everything SMBs need to sell online, integrated into the website they already have with you.

cards.title: One-Click Store Activation
cards.body: Add a fully functional online store to any Online Presence Builder website with one click. No migration, no separate platform, no disruption.

cards.title: Mobile-Ready Commerce
cards.body: Responsive storefront, checkout, and product browsing optimized for smartphones and tablets — where the majority of shopping happens.

cards.title: Multi-Channel Selling
cards.body: Sell on the website plus Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, Amazon, and Google Shopping Ads — with centralized inventory and order management.

cards.title: Revenue-Driving Tools
cards.body: Abandoned cart recovery, discount codes, promotions, social selling, and subscription support. Sell physical goods, digital products, or services.

partnerAdvantage.heading: Turn Websites into Revenue Engines
partnerAdvantage.intro: Online Store transforms your website customers into ecommerce customers — with higher ARPU, stronger retention, and natural upsell into payment, security, and marketing services.

items.title: Expand ARPU from existing customers
items.body: Every website customer is a potential store customer. Tiered ecommerce plans let SMBs upgrade as they add products, traffic, and revenue channels.

items.title: Bundle into a complete digital stack
items.body: Online Store pairs with websites, SSL, domains, and marketing tools to create high-value packages that are harder to replace and easier to retain.

items.title: Offer DIY and managed models
items.body: Self-serve setup for tech-comfortable SMBs, or managed DIFM service for higher-touch clients. Same platform, two revenue models.

lifecycleFit.heading: The Growth Layer in Your Digital Portfolio
lifecycleFit.intro: Online Store sits at the intersection of 'Get Online' and 'Grow' — the natural next step for any SMB with a website and an audience ready to buy.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Domains, logo, and professional email establish the SMB identity.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: Website Builder, DIFM design, or custom development launches their presence.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: SEO, directories, and reputation management drive traffic to the site.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Online Store converts that traffic into revenue with multi-channel selling.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position ecommerce as the natural upgrade for any website customer ready to sell, a bundle anchor with SSL and payment security, and the gateway to email marketing and promotional tools.

cta.headline: Ready to Make Ecommerce a Growth Engine Under Your Brand?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to launch your white-label Online Store, bundle it with web and security products, and help SMBs start selling online — quickly, confidently, and under your brand.

heroImage.alt: Merchant managing an online store on a tablet
